name: Trust Auditor
description: A2A trust layer: verifies agent identity (optional multi-registry) and behavioral reputation from transaction history before high-stakes agent-to-agent flows. Decision-support scores, not guarantees.

extensions.description: Per-verification and subscription billing via AP2-style gateway (see docs/PAYMENTS_INTEGRATION.md in repo).

skills.name: Identity Check
skills.description: Verify agent id format and optional registry-backed signals (quorum across identity registries).

skills.name: Reputation Audit
skills.description: Combine identity validity with MCP-backed transaction success rates; emit trust score, status, and structured evidence.
